heroHeadline: Zelensky calls Trump envoys' Moscow visit before Kyiv 'disrespectful'
heroSubtitle: Infrastructure activity near the Belarus-Ukraine border mirrors logistics staging seen before the 2022 invasion, alarming analysts and Ukrainian officials watching for a potential second front
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
